title: New journal entry (twice in one month?!)
summary: A video game demo happened to me and I'm about to make it everyone's problem.
fulldesc:
A video game demo happened to me and I'm about to make it everyone's problem. A second update within one month, can you believe it?

    New:
  • Journal post about Diorama Break because it has been living rent-free inside my head for a month and I need to talk to someone else about it or I'll die
    Updated:
  • Nothing!
    Fixed:
  • Nothing!

title: The yapper returns: new journal entry
summary: Small update for today: a new journal entry, new TOTW, and a little bit of housekeeping.
fulldesc:
Small update for today: a new journal entry, new TOTW, and a little bit of housekeeping.

    New:
  • A journal entry rambling about how friends are cool and sometimes hanging out can fix you a bit actually
  • Thing of the week: helpful tools for Tomolife shenanigans
  • Added 3DS Pretendo code to /about - feel free to add me! Leave your code in the guestbook and I can friend back :]
    Updated:
  • Links to media trackers on /about - I changed my username on several sites, URLs now lead to the right profiles
  • Games I'm playing on /now (you'll never guess what the new one is lol)
    Fixed:
  • More of an adjustment - I fiddled with a couple things in my changelogs data structure. Now I can show a fuller list here while keeping to a short summary on the main page. I'm also trying a new format to see how I like it. Cool!

title: New page and a new TOTW!
summary: Say hello to the newest addition to lunarlily: the /now page! Got a new thing of the week to share too (and at the beginning of a week, no less).
fulldesc: Say hello to the newest addition to lunarlily: the /now page! Got a new thing of the week to share too (and at the beginning of a week, no less).

title: New journal entry!
summary: Yapping about the site overhaul in February (and a new TOTW). As with many things, a bit belated - but maybe it's better to not think of myself as on some sort of schedule?
fulldesc: Yapping about the site overhaul in February (and a new TOTW). As with many things, a bit belated - but maybe it's better to not think of myself as on some sort of schedule?

title: lunarlily v2.0 is live!
summary:
Long time, no update! After several months of scattered late-night coding sessions, the site overhaul is (mostly) complete.

  • Now built with Eleventy!
  • New site structure 100% coded by me (wow!)
  • Two new pages (links and changelog)
  • A shiny new coat of CSS paint :]

I'd like to talk about the process and some of the problems I ran into, but I want to get the actual update out first. Keep an eye out for a write-up soon!
fulldesc:

I'd like to talk about the process and some of the problems I ran into, but I want to get the actual update out first. Keep an eye out for a write-up soon!

title: New TOTW and new neighbors!
summary: Finally breaking the Thursday update stretch. New TOTW, the exciting (and very belated!) first addition to the Neighbors section, and a little notice about ongoing site construction (which is why I've been rather quiet!)

title: An RSS feed is born!
summary: If I set everything up correctly, there should now be a link on the right sidebar to this RSS feed! Hello! I also updated a few things on the credits page, including links to helpful RSS guides and some new VSCode extensions I started using recently.
